chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2267 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 5. 2. For orders on CMA No.11003/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.11004/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 03.09.2025. Mr. Mehmood Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---- After making certain preliminary submissions, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petition is not being pressed and the Petitioner would avail his remedy through Civil Suit No.8270/2025 pending before the learned Senior Civil Judge-VIII, Karachi, East. Under such circumstances, the instant Petition stands dismissed accordingly alongwith other pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
